G0600C_WHLCHR_CD G0600C_WHLCHR_CD G0600C Mobility Devices: Wheelchair Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident normally utilizes a wheelchair (manual or electric). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes) discontinued 09/30/2023
250 G0600D_LIMB_PRSTHTC_CD G0600D_LIMB_PRSTHTC_CD G0600D Mobility Devices: Limb Prosthesis Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident normally utilizes a limb prosthesis. -=Not assessed/no
